fields.remarks:
<format type="text/markdown"><![CDATA[
## Remarks

`SKDocumentXpsOptions` controls how an XPS document is created. Pass an instance to the
<xref:SkiaSharp.SKDocument.CreateXps(SkiaSharp.SKWStream,SkiaSharp.SKDocumentXpsOptions)>
overloads.

Because this is a struct, its fields are zero-initialized by default. `Dpi` defaults to `0`
(which Skia treats as a default DPI), and `AllowNoPngs` defaults to `false`.

## Examples

```csharp
var options = new SKDocumentXpsOptions { Dpi = 300 };
using var stream = File.OpenWrite("output.xps");
using var doc = SKDocument.CreateXps(stream, options);
using var page = doc.BeginPage(816, 1056);
// draw on page canvas...
doc.EndPage();
doc.Close();
```
]]></format>
fields.summary: Provides options for creating an XPS document.

fields.value: <see langword="true" /> to allow images to be embedded in formats other than PNG; <see langword="false" /> to require PNG fallback. The default is <see langword="false" />.
fields.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether embedded images are allowed without PNG format fallback.

fields.value: The DPI value. The default is <c>0</c>, which uses Skia's built-in default resolution.
fields.summary: Gets or sets the output resolution of the XPS document in dots per inch.

fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if all fields are equal; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.
fields.summary: Determines whether the specified <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKDocumentXpsOptions" /> is equal to the current instance.

params.obj: The <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKDocumentXpsOptions" /> to compare with the current instance.

fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if the specified object is an <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKDocumentXpsOptions" /> with equal field values; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.
fields.summary: Determines whether the specified object is equal to the current <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKDocumentXpsOptions" /> instance.

params.obj: The object to compare with the current instance.

fields.summary: Returns a hash code for the current <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKDocumentXpsOptions" /> instance.
